name: Error and reporting
purpose: The structured error type and the consistent rendering of errors across CLI and MCP surfaces.
responsibilities: Define a structured error type carrying the offending field, the rule broken and the document id
Render errors as readable terminal output for the CLI
Serialise errors as structured objects for MCP clients
Aggregate multiple validation failures so all are reported together
internalStructure: A small error type and a pair of renderers (terminal and structured). The renderers are pure functions over the error type.

interfaces.name: RcfError
interfaces.description: The structured error type used throughout the tool.

interfaces.name: renderForTerminal
interfaces.description: Render an RcfError as human-readable terminal output.

interfaces.name: renderForMcp
interfaces.description: Serialise an RcfError as a structured object for an MCP client.

tradeoffs: A single error type across surfaces costs a small loss of surface-specific detail but guarantees that error reporting does not drift between CLI and MCP.
notes: Validation failures aggregate; the renderers preserve the full list, not just the first.
